categories.body:
Alignment Adjustment Rows

Used as a means to vertically align content differently from the default top of a content row, these row styles can be used to break out content to highlight it on the page.

categories.name: z. TEST CONTENT | Text | Style Guide - Carousels Heading
categories.body:
Carousel Styles

Styles used to transform groups of like content into a carousel presentation. There are both multi and single item carousels, along with variants for content that has images, and ones that can be purely text based, though images will still show if included with the content.
